headline: Gen5 TLC, BiCS8 Pipeline Power Sandisk's Data Center Growth Ambitions
summary: SNDK leans into an AI-driven NAND reset as Gen5 TLC wins a second hyperscaler nod, with BiCS8 TLC and QLC Stargate ramps eyed to lift data center SSD mix.

raw.headline: Gen5 TLC, BiCS8 Pipeline Power Sandisk's Data Center Growth Ambitions

headline: NETAPP INC (NASDAQ:NTAP) Offers a Dependable Dividend Backed by Strong Earnings Power
summary: NetApp (NTAP) offers a reliable ~2% dividend yield, backed by strong earnings power, a sustainable payout ratio, and a decade of consistent payments.
